article.title: These crucial Google services on Samsung phones may be waiting for you to update
article.summary: Credit: Adamya Sharma / Android Authority TL;DR Google has rolled out updates for Android System SafetyCore, Android System WebView, and Google Play Services on Samsung phones. The updates carry the version numbers 1.0.925574157, 149.0.7827.91, and 26.22.33. These apps don’t appear on the Manage apps & device page, so you’ll need to update them manually. When you need to update an app on your Samsung phone, you can open the Google Play Store, navigate to Manage apps & device, and hit Update or Update all. This same process works for almost every Google-made app, but there are a few exceptions. Some of those exceptions just got an update, and you’ll need to update them manually to get the new versions. Spotted by SamMobile , Google has rolled out updates for Android System SafetyCor
article.title_zh: 三星手機上的這些關鍵 Google 服務可能在等待你更新
article.summary_zh: Google 已為三星手機推出了 Android System SafetyCore、Android System WebView 和 Google Play Services 的更新。

article.title: Intel and AMD's new ACE CPU extensions bring an efficient AI-oriented instruction set to x86 — a new design makes matrix multiplication more power- and density-efficient
article.summary: ACE CPU extensions bring an efficient AI-oriented instruction set to x86 — new design makes matrix multiplication more power- and density-efficient
article.title_zh: Intel 和 AMD 推出新 ACE CPU 擴展功能，為 x86 帶來高效 AI 導向指令集 — 新設計使矩陣乘法運算更省電且密度更高
article.summary_zh: ACE CPU 擴展功能為 x86 帶來高效 AI 導向指令集，新設計使矩陣乘法運算更省電且密度更高。

article.title: Love NotebookLM but hate giving Google your data? I found a great open-source alternative
article.summary: Credit: Shimul Sood / Android Authority I personally love NotebookLM, though it’s far from the only tool I’ve used for summarizing information or extracting research data. It is arguably the very best, though, as pretty much every alternative is closer to a supplement than a true replacement. That said, there is one that gets very close. Open Notebook is virtually a clone of NotebookLLM’s core functionality, including stand-out features like audio summaries, the ability to ask questions about your research sources, and so much more. Of course, nothing is perfect, and it isn’t without catches. Below, I’ll dive into what I love about Open Notebook, what is less ideal about it, and how to give it a try for yourself.
article.title_zh: 喜愛 NotebookLM 但不想將資料交給 Google？我找到了絕佳的開源替代方案
article.summary_zh: NotebookLM 是資訊摘要和研究資料提取的最佳工具，但若擔心隱私問題，市場上存在開源替代方案可供選擇。

article.title: Jio Platforms Plans $3 Billion Debt Reduction from IPO Proceeds
article.summary: Jio Platforms Ltd. plans to use part of the proceeds from its proposed initial share sale to repay its telecom unit’s external commercial borrowings of almost $3 billion, a draft IPO document showed.
article.title_zh: Jio Platforms計畫從IPO收益中減少30億美元債務
article.summary_zh: Jio Platforms Ltd.計畫使用擬議首次股票發行的部分收益來償還其電信部門約30億美元的外部商業借款。

article.title: Get AMD's flagship Ryzen 7 9800X3D with 32GB of DDR5 memory and an MSI B850 Wi-Fi 7 motherboard at a discount — Micro Center bundles are now available on Amazon
article.summary: Micro Center is now selling some of its bundles on Amazon, including this 9800X3D combo that gives you an excellent motherboard and fast RAM without breaking the bank.
article.title_zh: 在亞馬遜上以折扣價購買AMD旗艦級Ryzen 7 9800X3D、32GB DDR5記憶體和MSI B850 Wi-Fi 7主機板——Micro Center套裝組合現已推出
article.summary_zh: Micro Center現在在亞馬遜上銷售其部分套裝組合，包括這款9800X3D組合，提供優質的主機板和高速RAM，價格實惠。

article.title: China unifies tech sector to build grid-free orbiting satellite AI data centers, challenging Elon Musk's SpaceX — Beijing's forced chip and satellite alliance announced a week before Musk’s AI1 reveal
article.summary: Beijing says the Space Computing Industry Innovation Center will bring together rocket and satellite manufacturers, chip manufacturers, and AI labs to develop a space-based data center system.
article.title_zh: 中國統整科技產業打造不依靠電網的軌道衛星 AI 數據中心，挑戰 Elon Musk 的 SpaceX — 北京強制芯片和衛星聯盟在 Musk AI1 發布一週前宣布
article.summary_zh: 北京宣布設立太空計算產業創新中心，整合火箭和衛星製造商、芯片製造商及 AI 實驗室，開發基於太空的數據中心系統。

article.title: Researcher turns wi-fi smart lightbulb into a Banned Book Library — open source project makes digital books available via a server and open Wi-Fi access point hacked into an ESP32-powered bulb
article.summary: A security researcher has added another dimension to smart lightbulbs by stealthily adding what they call a 'cyberpunk digital dead drop' full of 'banned books.'
article.title_zh: 研究員將 Wi-Fi 智慧燈泡改造成禁書圖書館 — 開源專案透過駭入 ESP32 供電燈泡的伺服器和開放 Wi-Fi 接取點來提供數位書籍
article.summary_zh: 安全研究員為智慧燈泡增添新功能，偷偷將其改造成充滿「禁書」的「朋克數位死信箱」。

article.title: China unveils man-portable anti-drone laser that can burn through a drone 1,600 feet away in four seconds — backpack-sized 2-kilowatt weapon uses AI for targeting, weighs 55 pounds, and can be carried by a single soldier
article.summary: Chinese defense supplier Harbin Xinguang Optic-Electronics Technology demo’d two man-portable anti-drone lasers at a Beijing arms expo this week.
article.title_zh: 中國推出人員可攜帶反無人機雷射槍，1,600 英尺內四秒燒穿無人機 — 背包式 2 千瓦武器採用 AI 瞄準系統，重 55 磅，單兵可攜帶
article.summary_zh: 中國防務供應商哈爾濱新光光電科技本週在北京軍事博覽會展示了兩款人員可攜帶反無人機雷射槍。

article.title: Apple’s M6 chip launches this fall, with these new products rumored
article.summary: Apple’s next-generation M6 chip is rumored to launch this fall, here’s which new products are expected to get M6 first.
article.title_zh: Apple M6 晶片今年秋季發布，這些新產品傳聞將首批配備
article.summary_zh: Apple 下一代 M6 晶片傳聞將在今年秋季推出，以下是預期首先搭載 M6 的新產品。
